title: Zustand store for coordinating pending jump targets across editor remounts
purpose: Manages a single pending jump target to synchronize selectSnippet -> editor mount -> jumpToLine flow across component remounts.
module_context: Exports a zustand store with pending jump state and methods to set and consume pending jumps.

steps.content: Create a zustand store with initial pending jump state set to null.
Define the setPending method to update the pending jump value.
Define the consume method to check if the pending jump matches the given snippet ID.
IF the pending jump matches, return its line number and clear the pending entry.
ELSE return null to indicate no matching pending jump.
